response.global_analysis: Audio features a full live performance of 'Hibikase' by Fuma Iroha. The spoken vocals phonetically match the provided JSON reference lyrics. Timing is strictly tied to the audio waveform, ensuring subtitles appear exactly when sung. On-screen text for the live title 'Reversible' is captured at the beginning and end. The segment ends with a brief spoken greeting after the song concludes.

subtitles.original: Reversible
subtitles.english: Reversible

subtitles.original: ヒビカセ
subtitles.english: Hibikase (Resonate)

subtitles.original: 真夜中に告ぐ音の警告
subtitles.english: A sound gives its warning in the middle of the night

subtitles.original: 共鳴音に酔う午前零時
subtitles.english: I'm intoxicated by the resonance at midnight

subtitles.original: 貴方が触れる高まる熱
subtitles.english: You're touching the heat that's increasing

subtitles.original: 指先に踊らされて
subtitles.english: Dancing at the fingertips

subtitles.original: 感覚 即 体感
subtitles.english: Sensation, then actual experience

subtitles.original: 寝静まる夜 二人だけの密
subtitles.english: The quiet night, a secret for just the two of us

subtitles.original: 体感 即 快感
subtitles.english: Actual experience, then pleasure

subtitles.original: 重なる波形に魅了されていく
subtitles.english: I'm being charmed by the overlapping waveforms

subtitles.original: 忘れないでね 私の声を
subtitles.english: Don't forget my voice

subtitles.original: 画面越しでいい ちゃんと愛して
subtitles.english: It's fine even if it's through the screen, love me properly

subtitles.original: バーチャルだって突き放さないで
subtitles.english: Don't push me away even if I'm virtual

subtitles.original: 貴方の音にまだ溺れていたい
subtitles.english: I want to still be drowning in your sound

subtitles.original: 覚えていてね 私の声を
subtitles.english: Remember my voice

subtitles.original: 貴方がくれたこの身全てを
subtitles.english: Everything about this body you gave me

subtitles.original: 見つめ合う貴方と二人
subtitles.english: The two of us staring at each other

subtitles.original: 重ねた息と音と響かせ
subtitles.english: Resonating with the overlapped breath and sound

subtitles.original: 真夜中に問う冷え切った熱
subtitles.english: A midnight question to the chilled heat

subtitles.original: 待ち続けてる午前零時
subtitles.english: 12 AM that I keep waiting for

subtitles.original: 鏡映しに飽和していく
subtitles.english: Being saturated by the mirror image

subtitles.original: 知らない音が伝う
subtitles.english: Unknown sounds are being transmitted

subtitles.english: Sensation, then actual experience

subtitles.english: The quiet night and breathing match up

subtitles.original: 錆びたロジック「今一度」を焦がれる
subtitles.english: The rusted logic, I'm yearning for "one more time"

subtitles.original: 忘れないでね 私の声を
subtitles.english: Don't forget my voice

subtitles.original: 次元も超えて飛ばすシグナル
